title: 10 best herbal tinctures for bursitis
description: Horse chestnut tinctures helps with bursitis because of its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. The tannins present in the tincture have been shown to reduce swelling and pain associated with bursitis, while the flavonoids help to protect the affected area from further damage.
